prompt: Enhance chart colors with gradient effects, add a subtle background pattern of travel icons for visual interest.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a bar chart titled 'Survey on Why People Travel'. Apply a subtle vertical gradient effect to each of the four colored bars (blue, red, green, yellow), transitioning from a slightly darker shade at the base to a lighter shade at the top for each respective bar. Additionally, overlay a subtle, repeating pattern of faint, small travel-themed icons (such as airplanes, suitcases, globes, or compasses) across the entire white background area, ensuring the pattern does not obstruct any chart elements, text, or axes.
objects: Blue bar with vertical gradient effect
Red bar with vertical gradient effect
Green bar with vertical gradient effect
Yellow bar with vertical gradient effect
